Nancy Drew (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,584,685Details
International Box Office $5,119,160
Worldwide Box Office $30,703,845
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,023,643
Total $11,023,643
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,832,318 (26.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.74 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:83.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,612 opening theaters/2,612 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,475,700

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 15th, 2007 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: March 11th, 2008 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild violence, thematic elements and brief language.
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Amatuer Slueth, Inheritance, Kidnap, Private Investigator, Single Parent, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Adopted Family
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Virtual Studios, Jerry Weintraub
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
